calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND K. WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-14-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
